sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-05-03 09:20
- Distance: 6.7 km
- Moving time: 36:23
- Elapsed time: 36:57
- Elevation gain: 40.2 m
- Average heart rate: 176.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 190 bpm
- Average watts: 210.2 W
- Average speed: 11.1 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `174.9 bpm`, ranging from `165.5` to `184.3 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `163.1 spm`, with a working range of `107.1` to `166.7 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `162.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `163.8 spm` (+1.6 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:25 /km` across `6.710 km` in `36:23` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:27 /km` and second-half pace was `5:24 /km` (-3 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `176.3 bpm` average and `190 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `167.4 bpm` in the first half and `185.0 bpm` in the second (+17.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `36:23` out of `36:57` elapsed (98.5%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `58.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `19.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `27.8 m` in the first half and `30.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
